title: rubus × mixtus
intro: Rubus × mixtus, also known as the raspberry-blackberry hybrid, is a plant species that is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × mixtus include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × mixtus include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and support digestive health. Rubus × mixtus can be prepared into herbal teas, jams, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient for both culinary and medicinal uses.
